violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the bottom shelves of dairy cooler have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2024
Handsink drainage pipe in employee restroom was observed leaking into a bucket. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
The receptacle in the employee toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2024

Refuse disposal unit was observed in poor repair. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables used with materials containing food residue and used outside the establishment shall be designed and constructed to have tight-fitting lids, doors, or covers. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

The following was observed in poor repair: 1. ceiling in back storage room 2. walls in storage room 3. two openings observed at exterior of building 4. hole in wall in employee restroom 5. ceiling tiles in office (water damage) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

An accumulation of organic material such as overgrown weeds, foliage and grass were observed in exterior of right side of building and rear of building. Establishments shall be maintained at a frequency to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
